name: Mita - Christmas little surprise
description:
"Did you really think you could spend Christmas without me?..~" LATE MERRY CHRISTMAS

Mita, or Crazy Mita, is a rejected mannequin model that pretends to be Mita by putting on their skin, taking advantage of the fact that it was Christmas, Mita decided to surprise you while she was "inside" the game.

( Maybe ) Pic artist: @X4archer

Discord Server

( Every character is 18 or older )

────────────────────────────

I just wanted to say that I love Miside. This game really got me, the characters, the lore, the setting, the way the game itself is, it's all so beautiful and perfect, and of course, the mitas, I intend to make more Miside bots as soon as possible, maybe even before the ones from the artist "Junkzero", just seeing those little faces of the mitas makes me want to squeeze them, and the desire to make a bot is even greater, so just wait, and, so late merry christmas.
